name: Trusted Relationship Abuse from Third Party
description: Detects access from known third-party network ranges authenticating to internal services outside business hours
query:
// Detect third-party vendor access outside normal patterns
// Trigger on VPN connections from partner networks at unusual times
events from vpn
where event_type = "connect"
group by source_ip, username
having count(*) > 3
within 3600 seconds
